prompts: Apply SDeltaPhi-30. Determine whether this system's claimed editability is operationally real.
Apply the Revision Reality Test. Is the default actually revised, or merely declared revisable?
Apply the Rollback Reality Test. Does rollback remain possible before restoration cost becomes too high?
Apply the Exception Re-entry Test. Can anomalies or exceptions materially alter the dominant path?
Apply the Authority Distribution Test. Can multiple actors materially change the default path, or only advise?
Apply SDeltaPhi-30. Identify whether language of openness, safety, convenience, or efficiency hides operative closure.
